title: Crystalline forms of a MAGL inhibitor
abstract: Described herein are crystalline forms of the MAGL inhibitor 1,1,1,3,3,3-Hexafluoropropan-2-yl(S)-1-(pyridazin-3-ylcarbamoyl)-6-azaspiro[2.5]octane-6-carboxylate.
claims: 1. A crystalline form of 1,1,1,3,3,3-Hexafluoropropan-2-yl(S)-1-(pyridazin-3-ylcarbamoyl)-6-azaspiro[2.5]octane-6-carboxylate form 3, characterized by having an X-ray powder diffraction obtained using CuKα1 radiation (λ=1.5406 Å) comprising peaks at the following 2θ-angles: 6.61°, 9.16°, 13.09°, and 14.32°.
